templates.title: Start here
templates.description: A friendly first workspace: an inbox to capture anything, a five-minute tour, and an onboarding checklist that teaches you databases by using one.

templates.title: Plan and ship a project
templates.description: A release hub with a kanban board, deadline calendar, meeting notes, and milestones whose effort totals compute themselves from the task tracker.

templates.title: Track what you read
templates.description: Keep every book in one place — what you want to read, what you're reading now, and what you finished — with ratings, genres, and notes you can browse as a gallery or a board.

templates.title: Build daily habits
templates.description: Log each day with one click and watch your streaks grow on a 30-day grid. Comes with four example habits and a month of realistic entries so you can see it working immediately.

templates.title: Plan a trip end to end
templates.description: Map out every day of a trip on one calendar — flights, hotels, food, sights — and track the budget with category totals and currency conversion. Ships with a 9-day Japan example.

templates.title: Take course notes that stay organized
templates.description: Keep every course in one place: a home page linking each class, nested lecture notes with real formulas, and an assignment tracker sorted by due date and grouped by status.
